The following describes how to install a CPU:
Loosen the three captive screws (1->2->3) that secure the CPU cover.
Use the handle on the CPU cover to remove the CPU cover from the CPU enclosure.
Use the handle on the CPU cover to insert the new CPU cover into the CPU enclosure.
Make sure the CPU is mounted on the CPU cover in the correct orientation and
that the golden triangle on the CPU is aligned with the upper left corner of the
Insert the CPU enclosure where the CPU is installed into the CPU socket.
Place the CPU cover on the CPU socket.
Tighten the screws (1g, 2g, and 3) to secure the CPU cover.
Use the T20-Lobe drive to tighten the
three ﬂoating nuts in 1-3 sequence to
